hook.text: RASHFORD CONFIRMED RETURNING TO UNITED AS CLAUSE EXPIRES

beats.text: BARCELONA'S £26M BUY OPTION OFFICIALLY EXPIRED TODAY
HANSI FLICK PUSHED TO KEEP RASHFORD BUT FINANCES OVERRULED
RASHFORD WANTED TO STAY IN SPAIN BUT IT'S OVER
CARRICK HAS OPENED THE DOOR FOR A RETURN

caption: It's confirmed — Marcus Rashford's Barcelona chapter is officially over 🔴 The £26m buy option expired today, June 15, without Barcelona pulling the trigger. Manager Hansi Flick reportedly pushed to keep him, but the club's finances overruled it — Anthony Gordon's arrival made another winger impossible to justify. Rashford wanted to stay in Spain but will return to Old Trafford when his loan ends June 30. Michael Carrick has reportedly opened the door for a return — but Aston Villa and others are already circling. What do you want United to do with Rashford? 🔴 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow #rashford #barcelona
